# InstaClaw.io

> InstaClaw is a managed hosting platform for OpenClaw — the open-source personal AI agent framework. Users get a dedicated virtual machine with a fully configured OpenClaw instance live in minutes, accessible via Telegram, Discord, Slack, or WhatsApp. No technical experience required.

## What InstaClaw Does

InstaClaw provisions, configures, and maintains a personal AI agent for each user. Each agent runs on an isolated Linux VM with:

- Full shell access and persistent file system
- Claude AI models (Haiku, Sonnet, Opus) by Anthropic
- 20+ pre-installed skills (web search, email, calendar, file management, video creation, social media, crypto trading, and more)
- Persistent memory across conversations — the agent remembers everything
- MCP tool integration for extensibility
- Cron-based task scheduling for background automation
- Self-healing infrastructure that automatically recovers from failures

## Pricing

- Starter: $29/month (BYOK: $14/month) — 600 daily units
- Pro: $99/month (BYOK: $39/month) — 1,000 daily units
- Power: $299/month (BYOK: $99/month) — 2,500 daily units

All plans include a 3-day free trial. BYOK (Bring Your Own Key) lets users connect their own Anthropic API key for reduced pricing.

## Key Details

- Founded by Cooper Wrenn (Wild West Bots LLC)
- Built on OpenClaw (https://openclaw.ai)
- Infrastructure: Hetzner Cloud (dedicated Ubuntu VMs)
- AI Provider: Anthropic (Claude models)
- Tokens: $INSTACLAW (Virtuals Protocol), $CLAWLANCER (Base mainnet)
- Social: @instaclaws on X/Twitter, Discord community
